description_long: This is a modern accent chair featuring a rounded, open-back design with a black metal frame and vertical spindles forming the backrest and armrests. The seat and back cushions are upholstered in a dark brown, slightly distressed leather or leather-like material, giving it a sophisticated yet rugged appearance. The seat is thick and plush, while the back cushion is slightly oversized and loosely fitted for added comfort. The frame is constructed from tubular metal, providing both strength and a contemporary aesthetic. The legs are slender and straight, supporting the chair with a minimal footprint. This chair would be well-suited for urban environments such as lofts, cafes, or stylish waiting areas.
description: A modern chair with a black metal frame, vertical spindles, and dark brown leather cushions, combining comfort with a contemporary urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full seat and back cushions, with the open spindle design of the armrests and backrest clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left-side angle highlighting the curve of the backrest, the thickness of the seat cushion, and the depth of the chair.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded metal frame and vertical spindles, with the back cushion visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right-side angle showing the profile of the chair, the plushness of the cushions, and the open structure of the frame.
